title: 🔴 The AI Coding Marketplace is Finally LIVE!
summary: Cole Medin announced the launch of the Archon Workflow Marketplace, which is now open for community submissions. The marketplace uses an auto-review pipeline built by Archon itself to process submissions, demonstrating the tool's capability to automate code review workflows.
